capability_reason: ds4-server has no tokenize route; ds4 CLI exposes --dump-tokens exact IDs

probes.name: short_factual
probes.rendered_prompt: <пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ>You are a helpful assistant.<пљЬUserпљЬ>What is the capital of Japan?<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>

probes.name: two_turn_chat
probes.rendered_prompt: <пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>My favorite color is teal.<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>Understood.<пљЬendвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>What color did I name?<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>

probes.name: unicode
probes.rendered_prompt: <пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>Translate вАШna√ѓve caf√©вАЩ to жЧ•жЬђи™Ю. Emoji: рЯІ™рЯЪА<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>

probes.name: code
probes.rendered_prompt: <пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>In Python, what does `yield from iterable` do? Give one sentence.<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>

ds4_token_dump_command:
set -e
mkdir -p -- /tmp
: > /tmp/parity-ds4-pending.json.ds4-token-dump.txt
printf '%s\n' '=== DS4_TOKEN_DUMP short_factual ===' >> /tmp/parity-ds4-pending.json.ds4-token-dump.txt
/home/dsv4/ds4-project/src/ds4/ds4 --model /home/dsv4/ds4-project/gguf/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-IQ2XXS-w2Q2K-AProjQ8-SExpQ8-OutQ8-chat-v2-imatrix.gguf --dump-tokens -p '<пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ>You are a helpful assistant.<пљЬUserпљЬ>What is the capital of Japan?<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>' >> /tmp/parity-ds4-pending.json.ds4-token-dump.txt
printf '%s\n' '=== DS4_TOKEN_DUMP math ===' >> /tmp/parity-ds4-pending.json.ds4-token-dump.txt
/home/dsv4/ds4-project/src/ds4/ds4 --model /home/dsv4/ds4-project/gguf/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-IQ2XXS-w2Q2K-AProjQ8-SExpQ8-OutQ8-chat-v2-imatrix.gguf --dump-tokens -p '<пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>Compute 17 * 23 and give only the result.<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>' >> /tmp/parity-ds4-pending.json.ds4-token-dump.txt
printf '%s\n' '=== DS4_TOKEN_DUMP two_turn_chat ===' >> /tmp/parity-ds4-pending.json.ds4-token-dump.txt
/home/dsv4/ds4-project/src/ds4/ds4 --model /home/dsv4/ds4-project/gguf/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-IQ2XXS-w2Q2K-AProjQ8-SExpQ8-OutQ8-chat-v2-imatrix.gguf --dump-tokens -p '<пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>My favorite color is teal.<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>Understood.<пљЬendвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>What color did I name?<пљЬAssistantпљЬ></think>' >> /tmp/parity-ds4-pending.json.ds4-token-dump.txt

/home/dsv4/ds4-project/src/ds4/ds4 --model /home/dsv4/ds4-project/gguf/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-IQ2XXS-w2Q2K-AProjQ8-SExpQ8-OutQ8-chat-v2-imatrix.gguf --dump-tokens -p '<пљЬbeginвЦБofвЦБsentenceпљЬ><пљЬUserпљЬ>Translate вАШna√ѓve caf√©вАЩ to жЧ•жЬђи™Ю.
